case_title: ALEJANDRA GUZMAN VS. ISIDRO SAENZ PARDO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUZMAN, ALEJANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARDO, ISIDRO SAENZ $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $86.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,686.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-12-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARDO, ISIDRO SAENZ

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ISIDRO SAENZ PARDO SET FOR JUN-17-2009 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-16-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. UPON FURTHER REVIEW OF THE FILE, THE COURT CONTINUES THE HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT TO TAKE FURTHER TESTIMONY FROM THE PARTIES. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,350.00 FILED BY GUZMAN, ALEJANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT PARDO, ISIDRO SAENZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PARDO, ISIDRO SAENZ HEARING SET FOR JUN-17-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY PARDO, ISIDRO SAENZ

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ISIDRO SAENZ PARDO IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO SEP-25-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF.
